titleStmt.title: SII 9.107: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 107. (A.R. No. 298 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SANKARALINGESVARASVAMI TEMPLE AT SIRASTAHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 970, Sarvadhāri, Māgha, śu. 5, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Vyatīpāta. In Sarvadhāri, Māgha śu. 5 fell on A.D. 1050 January 11 Wednesday, not Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa 19. The epigraph refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and records that, when his feudatory Narasiṅgadēva of the Pallava family was ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Kadambaḷige thousand, Ballakunde three-hundred and Sindavāḍi thousand, Būtabbarasiyara Kōkarasa and the Mahājanas of the village, with Puṭṭiyaṇṇa as their head, made a gift of many plots of land with some rows of arecanut trees, a flower garden and an oil-mill to Vidyānidhi-Paṇḍita, disciple of Tējōnidhi-Paṇḍita for the service of the god Śaṅkaradēva of the mūlasthāna of Sirave[ḍe].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakanripakāḷātīta saṁvatsarasataṁga 970 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada
māgha suddha 5 Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇasankrā(ṁ)nti dvitīpātada(ṁ)ndu siraveḍe
ya mūlasthānada saṁkharadēvargge svasti samastabhuvanāśreya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivi
rddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatārṁmbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrī
matpallavakuḷānvaya nārasiṅghadēvaṁ kōgaḷi Aynūṟuṁ kadaṁbaḷige sāyiravuṁ balle
kunde mūnūruṁ siṁdavāḍi sāyiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷana
diṁdāḷuttire śrīmatmanneya būtabbarasiyara kōkarasanu vūroḍeya
puṭṭiyaṇnapramukhamahājana nūṟayirpadiṁbarumaṟuvatto
kkaluṁ tējōnidhipaṇḍitara sissyarappa vidyānidhipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārā
pūrvvaka koṭṭa keyyi kosagana kalliṁ paḍuvaṇapaḷḷada nīrvvariyiṁ māvi
na koṇḍadiṁdoḷage kōgaḷiya gaḷeya mattarppanneraḍu . māṇikaseṭṭiya kaṭṭa
da keḷage gaḻde mattaroṁdu kaḍa baysageṟeya keḷage Aṟunūṟu baḷḷiya tōNṭa
panneraḍu maneya nelasaṇavettugāṇa 1 kaigāṇa 1 Ūroḍeyanaḷiya daṇḍaya
ṇna tanna Aḍakeya tōṁṭadoḷu naḍuvaṇa liṁgaṁ baresi biṭṭa sāloṁdu gavuṇḍara
ghaṭṭidēvargge koṭṭaḍakeya mara mūṟu koṭṭāreda karaṇaṁ dēvargge pūjisuva pa
ṇa 5 dhūḷiyaḍake koylāḷigaḷadarisinada pāgaṁ dēvagoḷagaṁ dharmmagoḷagaṁ vondu po
ṟelaguḍi bhāyipayya laguḍigara dharmmamāgi tamma teṟeyaṁ biṭṭa narasiṅghayya
na maga sōmanāthayyanu mākaṇnanu phaḷāvaḷigegoṭṭaḍakeya maraneraḍu māḷa
yyaneṟahayya biṭṭa maraneraḍu . Intida sarvvabādhāparihāramāge rakṣisidavarvvā
ṇārāsi kurukṣētreṁ gaṁge gaṁgasāgara prayāge Arggyatīrtthadalu sāyira kavile
ya kōḍuṁ kuḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷiṁ kaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa sāsirvvarbrāhmaṇa
rggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamidanaḷida sāyira kavileyu sāyira brāhmaṇa
ruma sāsirvvarttapōdhanarumanaḷida pātaka . gaḷeyuṁ pugisuvudembaṁ gaḷagaḷaniḷi
guṁ baḷikke laṁcaṁ bērppa ghaḷilene tāygaṁ taṁgegavaḷipidavaṁ lekkaviḍuvavaṁ mā
digaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ .
sarvvā(ni)nētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārthivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yyācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
svadattaṁ paradatta(ṁ)ṅvā yō harati vasu(ṁ)ndharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
